creator: Cy.Schubert@komquats.com
text:
In message <20101220205126.62EB720590@u18-124.dslaccess.de>, olli hauer 
writes:
> Hi Oliver,
> 
> can you try the following patch?
> Worked for my in a quick test.
> 
> Additional the patch honors NOPORTEXAMPLES flag.
> 
> 
> --- patch_screen.txt begins here ---
> Index: Makefile
> ===================================================================
> RCS file: /home/pcvs/ports/sysutils/screen/Makefile,v
> retrieving revision 1.81
> diff -u -r1.81 Makefile
> --- Makefile	18 Nov 2010 20:44:32 -0000	1.81
> +++ Makefile	20 Dec 2010 20:48:47 -0000
> @@ -29,6 +29,7 @@
>  .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
>  
>  GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
> +CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--prefix=${PREFIX}
>  .if defined(WITH_MAN)
>  MAN1=		screen.1
>  MAKE_ARGS+=	-DWITH_MAN
> @@ -63,7 +64,7 @@
>  .endif
>  
>  .if defined(WITH_HOSTINLOCKED)
> -EXTRA_PATCHES+= ${FILESDIR}/opt-hostinlocked
> +EXTRA_PATCHES+=	${FILESDIR}/opt-hostinlocked
>  .endif
>  
>  # show encoding on the status line via option "showenc"
> @@ -76,8 +77,10 @@
>  	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|/dev/ptmx|/nonexistent|' ${WRKSRC}/configure
>  
>  post-install:
> +.ifndef(NOPORTEXAMPLES)
>  	@${MKDIR} ${EXAMPLESDIR}
>  	@${CP} ${WRKSRC}/etc/etcscreenrc ${EXAMPLESDIR}/screenrc
> +.endif
>  	@if [ ! -f ${PREFIX}/etc/screenrc ]; then \
>  		${CP} ${EXAMPLESDIR}/screenrc ${PREFIX}/etc/screenrc ; \
>  	fi
> Index: distinfo
> ===================================================================
> RCS file: /home/pcvs/ports/sysutils/screen/distinfo,v
> retrieving revision 1.20
> diff -u -r1.20 distinfo
> --- distinfo	26 Oct 2006 04:27:46 -0000	1.20
> +++ distinfo	20 Dec 2010 20:48:47 -0000
> @@ -1,3 +1,2 @@
> -MD5 (screen-4.0.3.tar.gz) = 8506fd205028a96c741e4037de6e3c42
>  SHA256 (screen-4.0.3.tar.gz) = 78f0d5b1496084a5902586304d4a73954b2bfe33ea13e
> dceecf21615c39e6c77
>  SIZE (screen-4.0.3.tar.gz) = 840602
> Index: pkg-plist
> ===================================================================
> RCS file: /home/pcvs/ports/sysutils/screen/pkg-plist,v
> retrieving revision 1.29
> diff -u -r1.29 pkg-plist
> --- pkg-plist	30 Aug 2004 08:06:56 -0000	1.29
> +++ pkg-plist	20 Dec 2010 20:48:47 -0000
> @@ -1,4 +1,5 @@
>  bin/screen
> +%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/screenrc
>  %%DATADIR%%/utf8encodings/01
>  %%DATADIR%%/utf8encodings/02
>  %%DATADIR%%/utf8encodings/03
> @@ -17,8 +18,7 @@
>  %%DATADIR%%/utf8encodings/cd
>  %%DATADIR%%/utf8encodings/d6
>  @unexec if cmp -s %D/etc/screenrc %D/%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/screenrc; then rm -f %D
> /etc/screenrc; else echo If permanently deleting this package, %%PREFIX%%/etc
> /screenrc must be removed manually; fi
> -%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/screenrc
>  @exec [ -f %D/etc/screenrc ] || cp %B/%f %D/etc/screenrc
> -@dirrm %%EXAMPLESDIR%%
>  @dirrm %%DATADIR%%/utf8encodings
>  @dirrm %%DATADIR%%
> +%%PORTEXAMPLES%%@dirrm %%EXAMPLESDIR%%
> --- patch_screen.txt ends here ---

The patch failed to apply cleanly but I'll try to reproduce the problem 
locally.


-- 
Cheers,
Cy Schubert <Cy.Schubert@komquats.com>
